textPlain: Humans drivers and self-driving companies that creates such hit-and-run situations should be prosecuted the exact same way as when they hit a child who didn’t look while crossing the street.Perhaps assign a safety driver that puts its own driving license and criminal liability on the line, so the company cannot evade responsibility.
Hitting a pet / animal should be treated the same as hitting a child? No.
This was a cat, not a child.
